ddls:
CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the problem */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate of the problem (percentage of successful submissions) */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the problem (e.g., Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  "solving_time" REAL /* Average time taken to solve the problem (in hours) */,
  "problem_link" TEXT /* Link to the problem description */,
  "problem_tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated tags for the problem (e.g., arrays, linked-lists) */,
  "problem_category" TEXT /* Category of the problem (e.g., algorithms, data-structures) */,
  "problem_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the problem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the problem was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the problem was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user, guest) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Link to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the submission */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem submitted */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Date when the submission was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., Accepted, Rejected) */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code submitted by the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used for the submission */,
  "runtime" REAL /* Runtime of the submission (in seconds) */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the submission (in MB) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the submission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the submission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion entry */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related problem */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the discussion */,
  "discussion_text" TEXT /* Content of the discussion */,
  "discussion_date" TEXT /* Date when the discussion was posted */,
  "parent_discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent discussion (for replies) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the discussion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the discussion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user on the leaderboard */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Total score accumulated by the user from successful submissions */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user on the leaderboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the leaderboard entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the leaderboard entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "badge_description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the badge was earned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the badge was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_sets" (
  "problem_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem set */,
  "problem_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the problem set */,
  "problem_set_description" TEXT /* Description of the problem set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the problem set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the problem set was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_set_problems" (
  "problem_set_problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem in a problem set */,
  "problem_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem set */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the problem was added to the problem set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the problem was last updated in the problem set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_set_problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_set_problems_problem_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_set_id") REFERENCES problem_sets ("problem_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_set_problems_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contests" (
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contest */,
  "contest_name" TEXT /* Name of the contest */,
  "contest_description" TEXT /* Description of the contest */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the contest */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the contest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the contest was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the contest was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contest_id")
)
